calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY, SACRAMENTO, CENTER FOR COLLABORATIVE POLICY, EDMUNDO AGUILAR, J. HARTY and R. GREGORY BOURNE'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE AND SANCTIONS

Stephen Sayad, 331-5856, petitioner and responding party appearing in propria persona
George W. Holt of Johnson Schachter & Lewis, 916-921-5800, appearing for respondent and moving party

Argued and RESPONDENTS' MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE was granted. Venue is changed to Sacramento County. The request for fees is denied. Mr. Sayad requested a stay in enforcement of the order, and the Court granted a 10 day stay from notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/xKB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Continued To Sep-12-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. RESPONDENTS R. GREGORY BOURNE, CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY, SACRAMENTO, CENTER FOR COLLABORATIVE POLICY, EDMUNDO AGUILAR and J. HARTY'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE is continued to September 12, 2006 on the Court's own motion. (301/PJB/xKB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
